- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  - React Native project with Expo and TypeScript
  - Bottom tab navigation setup
  - Essential car pooling features structure

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  - Created project structure with npm package.json
  - Added TypeScript configuration
  - Set up Babel configuration for Expo
  - Created app.json with Expo configuration
  - Created main App.tsx entry point

- [x] Customize the Project
  - Added HomeScreen component
  - Added ProfileScreen component
  - Created src/screens and src/components directories
  - Set up project folder structure for scalability

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  - No specific extensions required for basic React Native development

- [x] Compile the Project
  - Dependencies installed via `npm install`
  - No compilation errors

- [x] Create and Run Task
  - Created .vscode/tasks.json with development server tasks
  - Available tasks: Start Expo Dev Server, Run Android, Run iOS, Type Check, Lint

- [x] Launch the Project
  - Run `npm start` to launch Expo development server
  - Or use the "Start Expo Dev Server" task from VS Code

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  - README.md created with project structure and scripts
  - copilot-instructions.md updated with completion status
